# Vividigit

> Productized digital marketing system. Buy structured outcomes, not vague retainers or anonymous freelancers.

Vividigit (formerly Alconost Digital) is a productized digital marketing company based in Madeira, Portugal. The site is organized around a graph of domains, services, scopes, solutions, countries, languages, industries, team profiles, and positions. The operating model combines structured commercial offers with named expert accountability.

## Company

- Legal entity: VIVIDIGIT LDA (NIF 299863727)
- Location: Caniço, Madeira, Portugal
- Heritage: Former Alconost Digital team, working in multilingual digital services since 2008
- Phone: +351 969 218 779
- Website: https://vividigit.com

## Core Model

- **Domain**: strategic layer used to frame the growth problem before choosing execution
- **Service**: productized capability inside a domain
- **Scope**: defined unit of work inside a service
- **Solution**: cross-service combination for broader business problems
- **Country / Language / Industry**: market context layers connected through the site graph
- **Position**: expert role connected to services, scopes, countries, languages, and industries

The site is built to help buyers move from broad need to concrete scope, and to help experts see where their capability fits inside the delivery system.

## Experts And Positions

- [Team](https://vividigit.com/team/)
- [Join Us / Positions](https://vividigit.com/positions/)
- [SEO Expert](https://vividigit.com/positions/seo-expert/)

The hiring model is project-based and expert-first. Positions are connected to real service, scope, country, language, and industry needs in the site graph.
